title: elaphoglossum schlimense
intro: Elaphoglossum schlimense, also known as Schlim's elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum schlimense include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
